content.en:
"Everyone, the Taixuan Light is too important, we have not given birth to the Taixuan Light in the Upper Linggao Origin Domain, if we can snatch the Taixuan Light, it will be of great significance to our Void Tooth Holy Gate! You don't need to deal with the True Mountain Holy Ancestor, you just need to find him and provide information. "

The Void Tooth Saint Ancestor said.

At this time, Feng Ming Origin Ancestor said: "Sect Master, the True Mountain Saint Ancestor is the top half-step sixfold Origin Ancestor, even if he finds it, he can't deal with him!"

At this time, the Void Tooth Saint Ancestor smiled and said, "I have also reached the top half-step sixfold Origin Ancestor realm, and once I find that True Mountain Saint Ancestor, he will inevitably be besieged, and I am not hopeless to snatch it." If they snatched the Taixuan Light from the True Mountain Holy Ancestor, even if they didn't return it to the Changbai High Origin Domain, they wouldn't be able to do anything. After all, we didn't offend the Changbai High Origin Domain, even if it was the Changbai Dao Ancestor, it was impossible to make a move on us casually, otherwise the Ancient Dao Alliance would definitely take care of it. "

Swire Daomeng!

Many Fivefold Ancestors had heard of this force, and it was a force established by the Sixfold Ancestors of the Primeval Plains, mainly to maintain peace in the Primeval Plains.

No matter how powerful the Changbai Dao Ancestor is, he is only a member of the Ancient Dao Alliance, and he can't just make a move.

After all, the half-step Sixfold Origin Ancestor can become a Sixfold Origin Ancestor at any time, which is very important to the Primeval Origin Realm, and it cannot be killed at will.

Of course, if the half-step Sixfold Origin Ancestor fought with each other, that would be another matter, but if the Sixfold Origin Ancestor had no reason, he couldn't kill casually.

Therefore, the Void Tooth Saint Ancestor was not very afraid of the Changbai Dao Ancestor.

If there is a chance to snatch the light of Taixuan, he will not let go of this opportunity.

With his strength, coupled with the fact that he was in the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, if the half-step sixfold ancestors of the Changbai High Origin Domain invaded here, the other half-step sixfold ancestors of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain would not sit idly by.

Moreover, these dozen or so half-step sixfold ancestors of the Shangling Origin Domain have already discussed and tried their best to snatch the light of the Taixuan, whoever grabs it belongs to whomever it wants, and no one else can snatch it anymore, and they must form an alliance to protect this share of the light of the Taixuan.

The Shangling Origin Domain urgently needs a Taixuan Light, so there is hope to become a Sixfold Origin Ancestor and let the strength of the Shangling Origin Domain skyrocket!

"Yes, Master!"

Many original ancestors answered.

Immediately, one by one, they sent their clones to find the True Mountain Plain.

In the entire Shangling Origin Domain, a large number of Fivefold Origin Ancestors were searching for the True Mountain Saint Ancestor, and the Changbai High Origin Domain was also constantly sending half-step Sixfold Origin Ancestors over, just to find the True Mountain Saint Ancestor.

At this time, even the Taihan Holy Ancestor of the Origin God Palace became interested, and he also sent the Primordial Black Beast under his command to find the True Mountain Saint Ancestor.

......

Time passed slowly, and countless original ancestors did not find the true mountain original ancestor, but after this operation, they found a lot of hidden treasures and river basins, so it can be regarded as a harvest.

this day.

There was another half-step six-fold ancestor from the Changbai High Origin Domain, it was the famous half-step six-fold ancestor, the Xuanpeng Holy Ancestor, who also came from other places.

At this time, he brought a treasure from the Changbai High Origin Domain-Time and Space Dao Talisman!

This is a treasure refined by the Changbai Dao Ancestor, containing the power of the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor, and he wants to use this treasure this time to track down the Blood Shadow Seal, so as to lock the location of the True Mountain Saint Ancestor.

Airplanes!

The space-time Dao talisman was used, and countless space-times were peeled back layer by layer, and finally a wisp of breath of blood shadow was sensed.

"True Mountain Holy Ancestor, you can't run away! A mere half-step Sixfold Primordial Ancestor dares to snatch the Taixuan Light of my Changbai High Origin Domain, it's just looking for death!"

Xuan Peng Holy Ancestor said angrily.

Rumble!!!!

One by one, the half-step sixfold ancestor locked the breath of the True Mountain Saint Ancestor and killed him.

And at this time, a half-step sixfold ancestor of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain also sensed it, and shuttled over, they wanted to fish in troubled waters.

......

"Discovered!"

True Mountain Saint Ancestor's face changed drastically.

In an instant, a battle broke out in this river basin.

In the blink of an eye, the basin was shattered and turned into nothingness.

Click!

A primordial Black Sea region was directly shattered, and the fragments of space-time pierced through the area.

At this time, some other half-step sixfold ancestors were only watching nearby, but they did not participate in the past, but once the True Mountain Saint Ancestor was about to die, then they were afraid that they would take action to snatch the body of the True Mountain Saint Ancestor.

At this time.

The Taihan Holy Ancestor of the Genshin Palace also sneaked here to see if there was any hope of fishing in troubled waters.

However, what Taihan Holy Ancestor didn't know was that Ye Tian had come to a large river basin connected to the Yuan Shen Palace at this time, and he was going to enter the Yuan Shen Palace through this river basin.

"Taihan Holy Ancestor, you actually left the Origin God Palace, and no one in the Origin God Palace can stop me now!"

Ye Tian smiled.

He wasn't ready to snatch the Taixuan Light at all, because his current strength couldn't defeat all the half-step sixfold ancestors, and he had little hope of snatching the Taixuan Light.

Moreover, he was still far from the half-step sixfold primordial ancestor realm, so for the time being, he only wanted to upgrade to the fifth-fold primordial ancestor late realm, and then talk about the rest.

Ye Tian infiltrated very easily through the relationship between the primordial black beast clones, and then made an instant move, so that those fivefold primordial ancestors of the Primordial Divine Palace did not have time to cut off the space-time passage.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian directly entered the river basin where the original god palace was located, and directly shot with all his strength, casting endless golden light!

Rumble!!!!

The light of the endless golden light really turned into countless golden lights, piercing through the bodies of primordial black beasts.

In an instant, a large number of primordial black beasts were bombarded and killed.

Then, Ye Tian smashed the magic circle of the Yuanshen Palace with one hand, broke into the treasure house of the Yuanshen Palace, and began to collect the resources here.

A primordial black beast at the peak of the Fivefold Origin Ancestor tried to stop Ye Tian, but was directly killed by Ye Tian.

As a result, the other Fivefold Origin Ancestors were stupid and fled directly, not daring to stop Ye Tian.

In the blink of an eye, Ye Tian took away most of the resources of the Origin God Palace.

......

"What, Genshin Shrine has been invaded!!"

The Taihan Holy Ancestor was stunned.

The headquarters of Genshin Shrine was discovered, which was unexpected by him, and not long after he left, Genshin Shrine was invaded, which was too much of a coincidence, as if the other party knew his whereabouts.

So, the Taihan Holy Ancestor immediately rushed back.

At this time, he didn't care about transferring again and again, and returned directly to the basin where the Genshin Palace was located, usually he wouldn't go back like this, and it would expose the Genshin Palace, but this time he couldn't take care of it.

And as soon as he rushed back, Ye Tian immediately ran away.

"Endless Ancestor !!!"

When the Taihan Holy Ancestor discovered Ye Tian's identity, he was immediately extremely angry.

Immediately, he didn't care about the consequences, and directly pursued and killed Ye Tian, and came to the Shangling Origin Domain.

At this time, Ye Tian directly fought with the Taihan Holy Ancestor.

Anyway, they've already come back, and he's still afraid that the Holy Ancestor won't be able to do it?

A big war has broken out!
